retry_reason: Failure means no extent mapping covers the given range; retrying with same parameters will also fail unless the tree is modified concurrently, which would require different handling.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference on an extent_map found by range in the extent_map_tree. Returns a pointer with an elevated refcount; caller must call free_extent_map() to release the reference. Returns NULL if no mapping covers the range. The caller must check the return value before use.

judge.reason: Function directly returns result of lookup_extent_mapping with true flag, which acquires a reference on the returned extent_map. No additional logic.
